payload.intent: Construct the complete SVG layout for the mechanical pocket watch, implementing all specified components including the metallic case, cream dial with Roman numerals and tick marks, three correctly positioned hands, two sub-dials, visible gear train with a balance wheel, and attached chain. Ensure precise centering in the 600×600 viewBox, apply appropriate metallic gradients and shading, and guarantee valid XML parsing for a realistic vintage illustration.

payload.critique: The artifact is a blank placeholder image containing only a grey background and the text 'edit artifact.svg'. It completely lacks the required mechanical pocket watch components (case, dial, hands, gears, chain, etc.). The first-pass description correctly identified all elements as MISSING. The last coder output claimed a detailed SVG was created, but the actual artifact provided is empty of the requested content.

payload.critique: The visible movement (gears) is MISSING from the required bottom-half cutaway area; the gears are currently placed in the top cutaway area above the dial, and the bottom half is covered by the dial. Additionally, the power reserve indicator sub-dial at 12 o'clock is MISSING (replaced by text). The most impactful change is to move the gear mechanism group to the bottom half of the watch (below the dial center) and replace the 'CHRONOMETER' text area with a proper power reserve arc sub-dial.
